title: The Dependency Array
description: Control when your effect runs with dependencies.

slides.title: Fine‑Tuning Effect Execution 🎛️
Example: Run Only on Mount
slides.content: Fetching data when the component first appears:

quizData.question: What does an empty dependency array `[]` mean for useEffect?

options.text: The effect runs after every render
The effect runs only once after the initial render
The effect runs only when state changes

quizData.explanation: An empty array tells React that the effect has no dependencies, so it should only run once after mount.
